full_text:
Wang Kui 王悝
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Wang Kui (王悝)was born in Linqiu county, Dong commandery. Due to his father’s achievements, he became a viscount. Wang Kui was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom.
